gherkin:
When the user enters "abc123" in the search field
And Test Data:
* Okta ID to Delete: abc123
Then the user should see 1 matching search result for oktaId "abc123"
When the user clicks on the "Delete" icon on the far right of the matching search result
Then the user should see the "Delete Override" dialog box open
And the user should see a confirmation message asking to confirm the deletion
When the user clicks the "Delete" button in the "Delete Override" dialog
Then the "Delete Override" dialog should close
And the user should return to the Overrides page
When the user waits for 2 seconds (for the deletion to process)
And the user refreshes the page
And the user enters "abc123" in the search field
Then the user should see no results within the table
And the override should be completely removed from the system
